news.headline: Tetra Tech wins contract with United Utilities in the UK to manage flooding and stormwater overflows for 5 years.
news.summary: Tetra Tech, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEK), a top consulting and engineering services company specializing in water, environment, and sustainable infrastructure, has been chosen by United Utilities for a multi-award contract in the United Kingdom to address flooding and stormwater overflow issues. The 5-year contract will involve Tetra Tech delivering technical support services to develop creative solutions utilizing predictive models to manage these challenges.

news.headline: UnitedHealth Group transforming payment models to support independent pharmacies, aligning with costs due to manufacturer pricing. Full implementation by Jan 2028. Trump's order enhances price transparency, benefiting Optum Rx's 24,000+ non-affiliated pharmacies.
news.summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc's Optum Rx is adjusting payment models to better reflect the costs pharmacies may incur due to manufacturer pricing actions, with a full implementation expected by January 2028. This move follows President Donald Trump's executive order in February to enhance price transparency regulations in the healthcare industry. The order mandates federal agencies to enforce and expand a 2019 rule that mandates hospitals and insurers to publicly disclose the actual costs of medical services. This shift will benefit Optum Rx's non-affiliated network pharmacies, including over 24,000 independent community pharmacies. The updated payment models aim to alleviate the burden of increasing drug prices on pharmacies and pharmacists who play a vital role in patient care. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Apple Hospitality REIT in Richmond, VA, announces monthly distribution and 2025 annual meeting date.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, Apple Hospitality REIT disclosed details of its upcoming events. The company revealed a monthly distribution to shareholders and set a date for its 2025 Annual Meeting. Shareholders can anticipate receiving regular distributions and mark their calendars for the crucial meeting ahead.

news.headline: Linnaeus Therapeutics announces publication of paper on LNS8801 in Cancer Research Communications, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Linnaeus Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Haddonfield, New Jersey, revealed important findings related to their work in oncology therapeutics. The company, which specializes in developing and bringing to market innovative small molecule treatments for cancer, shared significant data pertaining to its latest research efforts. This announcement signifies a significant step forward in the company's mission to advance novel oncology therapeutics.

news.headline: BRP to discuss Q4 and FY25 results on March 26, 2025. CEO and CFO to lead conference call. TSX: DOO, NASDAQ: DOOO.
news.summary: BRP Inc., traded as DOO on the TSX and DOOO on the NASDAQ, is scheduled to host a conference call to discuss its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of FY25. The call is set to take place on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. José Boisjoli, the President and CEO, along with Sébastien Martel, the CFO, will be leading the call. This announcement was made from Valcourt, QC on March 6, 2025.

news.headline: Guide to luxury adventure tourism in Mexico, featuring activities from deserts to jungles. Released on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Mexico City, an article highlighted the merging of adventure tourism and luxury experiences. Demonstrating that thrill-seeking and upscale accommodations can indeed complement each other, the piece catered to individuals seeking both excitement and comfort. The guide presented various destinations offering adrenaline-inducing activities along with top-notch amenities, tailored for those who appreciate the thrill of adventure yet also revel in the indulgence of a plush king-size bed and a meticulously prepared cocktail at the end of an action-packed day.

news.headline: Harbour Energy PLC initiates tender offer to purchase all outstanding 5½% Senior Notes due 2026 for cash.
news.summary: In London on March 20, 2025, Harbour Energy plc, a publicly traded company based in Scotland, disclosed the initiation of a tender offer known as the "Tender Offer." This offer aims to acquire in cash all of the remaining 5½% Senior notes issued by the company. The specific terms and amount of notes targeted for repurchase were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: PetSmart unveils its 2025 Arcadia Trail collection with durable gear for pets, making summer adventures easier. #PetSmart2025.
news.summary: The 2025 outdoor collection from PetSmart has been carefully crafted for durability and comfort. This exclusive line includes advancements in pet gear, apparel, and toys. Unveiled in Phoenix on March 20, 2025, by the largest omni-channel pet retailer in North America, the Arcadia Trail collection showcases cutting-edge designs for pets. This collection is set to revolutionize the outdoor pet experience with its innovative features.

news.headline: Bob Evans® offers chance to win Tax Day comfort kit with a year's supply of products. Win the ultimate relaxation package.
news.summary: Enter to win a Tax Day comfort kit from Bob Evans in NEW ALBANY, Ohio announced on March 20, 2025. The kit includes a year's supply of their products to one lucky fan. Bob Evans®, renowned for its comforting refrigerated dinner sides, aims to ease the Tax Day pressure for participants.

news.headline: ITS Logistics reports that the March Port Rail Ramp Index shows high import volumes in LA/LB and a potential increase in trucking rates due to capacity-demand ratio. This may impact dray and rail capacity as labor strikes ease. ILA signs contract extension until 2030.
news.summary: ITS Logistics released the March forecast for the US Port/Rail Ramp Freight Index. The index shows strong import volumes in Los Angeles/Long Beach post-Lunar New Year, potentially leading to rate increases for dray and rail capacity due to demand exceeding capacity. Equipment availability issues for exports persist, impacting ocean carrier lines in North America. The extension of the ILA's Master Contract with USMX until September 30, 2030, aims to provide workforce protection guidelines. Capacity tightening and terminal congestion are reported in major gateways like New York/New Jersey, Norfolk, Savannah, and Houston. This situation may affect truckers' dedicated pricing and tender acceptance in Q2. Labor strikes are no longer a concern on the East & Gulf Coasts, prompting a return of volumes there.

news.headline: EWA selects Dr. Roslyn F. Schneider, a renowned physician and biopharmaceutical leader, as its new member.
news.summary: EWA announced the addition of Dr. Roslyn F. Schneider on March 20, 2025. Dr. Schneider, a respected physician and biopharmaceutical leader, has joined as a member of the Exceptional Women Alliance. Known for her patient-centered advocacy and expertise, Dr. Schneider brings valuable experience to the organization.

news.headline: Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) Q3 earnings: $3.158 billion revenue missed $3.215 billion estimate, EPS beat at $2.80.
news.summary: Shares of Darden Restaurants Inc (NYSE:DRI) are seeing an uptick in premarket trading on Thursday following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company reported a 6.2% year-on-year increase in revenue to $3.158 billion, falling short of the analyst consensus of $3.215 billion. The growth in sales was attributed to a 0.7% rise in same-restaurant sales and revenue from the acquisition of 103 Chuy’s restaurants and 40 new restaurants. Darden achieved an operating margin of 13.2%, with operating income climbing 7.9% to $418.2 million. The adjusted EPS stood at $2.80. Further details of the report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Headlines from Danish Ship Finance A/S's 2025 AGM, with key numbers and updates.
Express Wash Concepts opens 11th Pittsburgh Clean Express Auto Wash at 6300 Steubenville Pike, offering free Signature Washes from March 21-30.Character count: 130
news.summary: Express Wash Concepts (EWC) has revealed the launch of their 11th Pittsburgh Clean Express Auto Wash at 6300 Steubenville Pike. The opening comes with a special promotion offering free Signature Washes from March 21 to March 30. The new facility is set to serve customers in Columbus, Ohio, and Pittsburgh starting March 20, 2025. This expansion marks a significant milestone for EWC, showcasing their commitment to providing quality car wash services to a wider audience.

news.headline: Flex has opened a new NPI center in Boston for healthcare customers, providing end-to-end product development solutions.
news.summary: A new NPI center in the Boston, Massachusetts area provides a comprehensive product development solution, covering all stages from prototype creation to preclinical builds, design verification, and production transfer. Situated near one of the globe's biggest medical technology innovation clusters, it offers a prime location for collaboration and growth. The center aims to streamline the process and boost efficiency for companies looking to bring new products to market swiftly and effectively.

news.headline: Cordial introduces AI tools for marketing messages, launching global SMS in 23+ markets; leader in retail messaging.
news.summary: Cordial, a company specializing in messaging for enterprise retail marketing teams, has introduced enhancements to its AI platform, Cordial Edge™. The updated AI technology aims to explain the effectiveness of marketing messages in converting potential customers. This development comes as Cordial launches its global SMS service across more than 23 international markets. The unveiling took place in San Diego on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Experienced FBI veteran Joseph Bonavolonta joins Wrap with 27-year background, previously SAC of Boston field office.
news.summary: In the latest reports, it has been confirmed that the United States has seen a surge in COVID-19 cases, with over 100,000 new infections and 1,000 deaths reported in the past 24 hours. This significant rise in numbers has raised concerns about the ongoing pandemic and the effectiveness of current preventive measures.Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and getting vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. The situation remains fluid, with healthcare systems under strain and hospitals reaching capacity in some regions. The government is closely monitoring the situation and considering implementing additional measures to control the outbreak.

news.headline: Tether's US treasury holdings surpass Canada, Taiwan, ranks 7th globally with $33.1B acquisitions, significant growth in stablecoin supply. Legislation for stablecoins may pass by August, according to industry experts. ETH predicted to bottom at $1.6K, SEC delays multiple crypto ETFs in recent updates.
news.summary: Tether, the $143 billion stablecoin giant, has become the world's seventh-largest buyer of US Treasurys, surpassing countries like Canada and Taiwan. Tether acquired over $33.1 billion worth of treasuries, positioning itself just below the Cayman Islands which purchased over $100 billion. This move is part of Tether's strategy to back its USDt stablecoin with secure and liquid investments. The stablecoin market has grown significantly, surpassing $219 billion, indicating continued growth potential. US lawmakers are working on legislation to regulate stablecoins, with a bill potentially passing as soon as August. Tether's growth and stablecoin adoption reflect a shifting landscape in the crypto market.

news.headline: Instacart introduces AI-powered ad automation tools; helps brands create high-performing campaigns. San Francisco, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Instacart, a prominent grocery technology company in North America, revealed a set of innovative AI-driven automation tools in San Francisco on March 20, 2025. These tools are designed to aid brands of varying sizes in crafting effective advertising campaigns on the platform. The company, listed on NASDAQ as CART, aims to assist businesses in generating high-performing ad content on Instacart.

news.headline: NC Community College System wins top 'Export Partner' award for boosting international exports of goods, services.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, the North Carolina Community College System (NCCCS), consisting of 58 public community colleges, was acknowledged for its efforts in aiding North Carolina businesses to export their products and services globally. The award underscores the significant impact of NCCCS in promoting international trade for organizations in the state.

news.headline: WhiteFiber and Shadeform partner to offer access to NVIDIA B200 GPUs through Bit Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: BTBT).
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Bit Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: BTBT), a New York-based company specializing in high-performance computing infrastructure and digital asset production, revealed that its subsidiary WhiteFiber, a prominent player in the industry, has made significant strides.

news.headline: Charleston County, South Carolina upgrades 911 centers to Carbyne Apex for improved emergency response capabilities with latest tech advancements.
news.summary: An enhanced 911 system has been launched with cutting-edge features, such as automated translation and transcription services, and call triage. The technology is provided by Carbyne®, a renowned public-safety tech company. The upgrade includes services for Charleston County, offering advanced solutions for emergency calls.SetTextCharacters280

news.headline: Coronado Research appoints Gary Lyons as EVP Medical Affairs, a senior leader with vast industry experience.
news.summary: In London on March 20, 2025, Coronado Research announced the appointment of Gary Lyons as their new Executive Vice President of Medical Affairs. With a wealth of experience in the field, Gary brings a strong background in strategic planning and operational execution throughout various stages of the industry and product development process. Prior to joining Coronado Research, he held leadership roles where he successfully spearheaded initiatives in medical affairs, leveraging his expertise to drive results.

news.headline: Partnership between ESG and Earth Etch aims to simplify retail energy market entry. Leaders in energy SaaS and compliance join forces.
news.summary: ESG, a prominent provider of energy SaaS solutions globally, has announced a merger with Earth Etch, a specialist in regulatory and operational compliance products, training, and services in North America. This partnership, effective March 20, 2025, combines ESG's Modern Retail Energy Platform with Earth Etch's expertise. The collaboration aims to enhance ESG's offerings in North America and optimize regulatory compliance processes. This strategic move signifies a major milestone for both companies and is poised to revolutionize the energy industry in the region.

news.headline: ESR ranked #7 in Consumer Electronics category on Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies List 2025.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on March 20, 2025, ESR, a prominent global tech accessories brand, was recognized in Fast Company's renowned Most Innovative Companies List for 2025, securing the 7th spot in the Consumer Electronics sector. This achievement highlights ESR's commitment to innovation and ground-breaking advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Truly Beauty to be featured on TikTok Shop's "New Arrivals," showcasing viral favorites & exclusive deals March 20-24.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Los Angeles, Truly Beauty, a popular TikTok sensation, is set to launch its "New Arrivals" campaign on TikTok Shop. The campaign will run from March 20 to March 24, showcasing their latest products to their audience. Known for their ability to leverage viral trends, Truly Beauty has established itself as a dominant force in the social media beauty industry. The upcoming event is expected to attract a large number of followers and shoppers looking to get their hands on the newest offerings from the brand.

news.headline: Direct Digital Holdings introduces "Practical Generative AI Use Cases & Tools for DMOs" to advance destination marketing.
news.summary: A recent guide has been released offering advanced artificial intelligence (AI) tactics and resources for Destination Marketing Organizations (DMOs) to boost advertising, improve guest interactions, and optimize operational effectiveness. The guide was made public on March 20, 2025, by Direct Digital Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRCT), a notable company in the industry. This will provide essential strategies and tools for DMOs seeking to enhance their marketing efforts and operational processes.

news.headline: Agmatix and BASF partner to create soybean cyst nematode detection tool using AI. Collaboration announced in March 2025.
news.summary: In the city of Ramat Gan in Israel on March 20, 2025, Agmatix, a prominent provider of AI-driven agronomic solutions, revealed a new partnership with BASF. BASF is globally recognized as a major player in the chemical and agricultural industry. The collaboration aims to create an advanced digital solution. This collaboration is set to leverage the expertise of the two companies in their respective fields, combining Agmatix's AI capabilities with BASF's extensive resources and industry knowledge to develop a state-of-the-art digital platform for the agricultural sector. This initiative signifies a significant step forward in the digital transformation of agriculture, with the partnership expected to bring innovative solutions to the market.

news.headline: Liqvd Asia acquires AdLift, forming a digital marketing powerhouse - merging cutting-edge creative solutions with performance-driven expertise.
news.summary: In Burlingame, California on March 20, 2025, AdLift, a prominent digital marketing agency focused on performance, was purchased by Liqvd Asia, a powerhouse known for innovative creative and integrated marketing solutions. This acquisition combines AdLift's extensive expertise with Liqvd Asia's strengths, marking a strategic move in the industry.

news.headline: SlashNext introduces a URL analysis tool tracking requests in real-time to expose hidden threats. Calif., March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A recent development introduces a new feature that conducts real-time, thorough scans and evaluation of unidentified URLs. This capability involves monitoring requests and tracing redirections to identify the initial link's ultimate destination. The technology comes from SlashNext, a prominent provider of cutting-edge AI cloud email services. This innovation originates in Pleasanton, California, unveiled on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Eckert & Ziegler and AtomVie Global Radiopharma form global supply agreement for Lutetium-177 chloride.
news.summary: Today, in a joint announcement made in Berlin and Hamilton, Ontario, on March 20, 2025, Eckert & Ziegler SE (ISIN DE0005659700, SDAX) and AtomVie Global Radiopharma Inc. revealed a new global supply agreement. Under this deal, Eckert & Ziegler is set to supply AtomVie with premium non-carrier added Lutetium-177 chloride (n.c.a...). This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies, as they aim to expand their reach and impact in the global radiopharmaceutical market.

news.headline: VAYK partners with Airbnb investing group to launch new service solution, enhancing short-term rental solutions.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Vaycaychella, Inc. (OTC Pink: VAYK) revealed a significant development on March 20, 2025. The firm has forged a strategic alliance with Airbnb investing group to introduce its service solution soon. The partnership looks promising as Airbnb is a reputable player in the short-term rental market. Vaycaychella's move to collaborate with such a renowned entity highlights its commitment to growth and expansion within the industry. This partnership is expected to bring about exciting opportunities and benefits for both parties involved.

news.headline: Knix partners with 4 female founders to launch new swimwear collection; campaign "Out of Office" celebrates women.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Toronto, Knix unveiled their newest campaign "Out of Office" alongside the release of their latest swim collection. Knix, known as the leading intimates, swim, active, and top Leakproof Brand in North America, continues to make waves in the industry. The campaign showcases four inspiring female founders.

news.headline: Audi Stratham wins 2024 Magna Society Award for commitment to excellence. Proud part of ICL Family of dealerships.
news.summary: Audi Stratham, located in Stratham, New Hampshire, proudly reveals that it has received the esteemed 2024 Magna Society Award. As a member of the ICL Family of dealerships, the award highlights the dealership's dedication to providing exceptional service. This recognition showcases Audi Stratham's commitment to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: RealFoundations partners with Vena to improve financial planning for real estate. Enhances capabilities with AI-powered FP&A platform. Strengthened support for companies. #Dallas #RealEstate
news.summary: Based in Dallas, RealFoundations, a leading consulting and managed services provider for the real estate sector, has recently established a partnership with Vena, the top AI-driven FP&A platform designed to maximize the benefits of the Microsoft technology environment. By joining forces with Vena, the #1 AI-powered FP&A platform, RealFoundations aims to enhance its offerings in financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting for real estate firms. This partnership underscores RealFoundations’ focus on delivering innovative solutions to its clients and advancing its commitment to revolutionizing the industry with state-of-the-art financial capabilities.

news.headline: Convergent Energy partners with Clemens Food Group for 14.5MW/29MWh energy storage system to stabilize costs, mitigate PJM prices.
news.summary: In New York, Convergent Energy and Power revealed their intention to supply Clemens Food Group with an energy storage system. The system, comprising a 14.5MW / 29MWh industrial-scale battery, aims to stabilize energy costs at Clemens’ Hatfield, Pa. site and shield against increasing capacity costs. Convergent will handle financing, ownership, and operations of the system, reinforcing its position as a prominent energy storage solutions provider in North America.

news.headline: Northrop Grumman to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 22 and conduct a webcast and conference call.
news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia, Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) stated that its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 will be disclosed on their investor relations website on April 22, 2025. Prior to the market opening, the company will release an advisory notice informing the public about the complete earnings release, available for viewing on their website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

news.headline: Red Pine's drilling at Wawa's Jubilee Shear hit 5.68 g/t Au over 10.72m, with best intersection of 19.05 g/t Au over 2.00m.
news.summary: During the recent step-out drilling activity at the Jubilee Shear, a noteworthy discovery was made. The drilling intersected a promising gold grade of 5.68 grams per tonne over a span of 10.72 meters. Within this interval, an even higher concentration of 19.05 grams per tonne of gold was found over a shorter distance of 2.00 meters. This finding indicates a potential increase in the gold reserves at the Jubilee Shear site.

news.headline: Global PSIM market to hit $4.3B by 2029, a 4.6% CAGR growth, driven by cloud solutions and integration needs. Top players include Everbridge, Axxonsoft, Genetec, Advancis.
news.summary: The global Physical Security Information Management Market is expected to grow from USD 3.5 billion in 2024 to USD 4.3 billion by 2029, with a 4.6% CAGR, as per a report by MarketsandMarkets™. Increased adoption of PSIM platforms and cloud-based solutions like easypsim Cloud are key growth drivers, reflecting a trend towards centralized security management for enhanced situational awareness and cost-effective operations. The market is shifting towards integrated security strategies, boosting demand for advanced PSIM systems. Top companies in the market include Hexagon AB, Honeywell, Hikvision, Everbridge, Axxonsoft, Genetec, Advancis, Entelec, Verint, and Vidsys. Major dynamics include rising security concerns, the need for system integration, complexity in integration, absence of standardization, and opportunities in cloud-based solutions, advanced technologies, and smart cities. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: T-Mobile gives $16M in funding for 25 communities, $50k each, reaching 375 communities. 100 char: T-Mobile funds $16M for 25 communities, $50k each, benefiting 375 total across 48 states and Puerto Rico.
news.summary: T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) from Bellevue, Wash., recently revealed the names of its most recent 25 Hometown Grant awardees, who are all slotted to obtain a maximum of $50,000 from the company. This financial backing from T-Mobile aims to assist in local development initiatives that aim to revive and enhance their respective communities. Beginning its five-year pledge to smaller towns and rural areas in April 2021, T-Mobile has already allocated over $16 million in Hometown Grants to a total of 375 communities spanning 48 states as well as Puerto Rico. As a result, the Hometown Grants program has produced positive impacts in numerous communities.

news.headline: Apple streaming subscribers grew to 45 mln last year - Information.
US Army debuts YouTube series "All You," promoting holistic health with H2F system. Aimed at youth, aiming to boost soldier readiness.
news.summary: A recently released video series called "All You" provides practical health tips based on the Army's Holistic Health and Fitness (H2F) framework, designed to improve Soldier readiness. Announced in Washington on March 20, 2025, the U.S. Army introduced this new educational series on YouTube aimed at offering actionable advice to viewers. This initiative aligns with the Army's goal of enhancing physical and mental well-being, reaching a wide audience through digital platforms. The "All You" series is part of the force's comprehensive approach to promoting health and fitness, integrating the proven H2F system.

news.headline: Study by Acadeum reveals benefits of student sharing between institutions, leading to improved retention and financial stability.
news.summary: Recent data released by Acadeum showcases the substantial revenue increases resulting from course sharing tactics implemented by the University of Mount Union and Angelo State University. This development comes amidst a backdrop of decreasing student enrollment and financial obstacles within higher education institutions. A white paper from Acadeum highlights the effective strategies employed by both universities, revealing significant financial gains. The findings emphasize the relevance of innovative approaches to navigate the current landscape, underscoring the importance of collaboration and resource optimization in addressing financial challenges in the sector.

news.headline: SATO Corp Board meets to discuss corporate matters and strategy.
OneStream (NASDAQ:OS) attains FedRAMP High Authorization for government cloud, meeting stringent safety standards.
news.summary: OneStream, Inc. announced that its government community cloud has recently achieved compliance with one of the most stringent safety standards applicable to all government levels. Based in BIRMINGHAM, Michigan, the company disclosed this information on March 20, 2025, through a press release. OneStream, Inc. (NASDAQ:OS) is a renowned enterprise Finance management platform provider, renowned for its cutting-edge services.

news.headline: Flexential named Top Workplace in the US based on employee feedback. Recognized for exceptional culture.
news.summary: Charlotte-based data center solutions company, Flexential, has been acknowledged for its outstanding workplace culture as per employee feedback. The recognized company offers secure and flexible data center solutions. The recognition positions Flexential as one of the top workplaces in the United States.

news.headline: Jotul Group is a major fireplace supplier in Europe and North America with history since 1853. Brands include Jøtul, Scan, Ravelli.
news.summary: The Jøtul Group is a major supplier of fireplaces in Europe and North America, with a history dating back to 1853. They offer stand-alone stoves, inserts, frames, and accessories for fireplaces under brands like Jøtul, Scan, and Ravelli. Jøtul fireplaces are made from cast iron with a classic Norwegian style, while Scan fireplaces have modern Danish design using plated steel. Ravelli offers pellet stoves with Italian design and technology. Production is done in Norway, Poland, France, and the USA, with products sold through a global network of sales companies and distributors. The company caters to end consumers through specialty shops and building materials retail chains in Norway.

news.headline: Lace Wallet now supports Bitcoin, enabling users to store, manage, and interact with it directly. Input | Output (IO) leads the initiative.
news.summary: Users of Lace can now conveniently store, control, and engage with Bitcoin directly from their wallet. This development was reported from London and Singapore on March 20, 2025. Input | Output (IO), a prominent infrastructure and research engineering company focused on fostering a lasting Web3 environment, revealed this information.

news.headline: FEI's subsidiary secures $12M contract for airborne time, synchronization, and frequency system through 2027.
news.summary: FEI-Zyfer, Inc., a subsidiary of Frequency Electronics, received a $12 million contract increase for the development of a customized high-precision airborne time system. The contract includes deliveries scheduled through 2027 and supports interoperability with advanced avionics technologies. The system is designed for high-dynamic environments and supports collaborative airborne operations. This contract showcases FEI's expertise in frequency control and commitment to aerospace and defense programs.

news.headline: OneDigital expands AI-powered Impact Studio nationwide, empowering employers with real-time insights and cost control.
news.summary: A cutting-edge platform powered by artificial intelligence is transforming workforce strategy by providing employers with up-to-the-minute insights, improved cost control, and the capacity to make impactful, data-informed decisions. The innovation was unveiled in Atlanta on March 20, 2025, via a press release from OneDigital, recognized as the top insurance provider in the country.
